intro: Trichoglottis triflora, commonly known as the three-flowered orchid, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties.
